response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed, and a dialogue-heavy segment was identified from 00:00 to 03:57. At 03:58, a song began. On-screen text identified the song as "Supernova", with lyrics by Haruno and music by Sasanosuke and Haruno. I performed a web search using "Supernova 春野 笹之助 Japanese and English lyrics" to obtain the official lyrics. The song is a well-known Vocaloid-style track originally by Yunosuke x Haruno. The characters in the video perform this song.
response.global_summary: The video features a talk show/variety segment with four virtual characters, followed by a performance of the song "Supernova".

scenes.description: Characters are talking and interacting on stage.
The characters perform "Supernova". Song title and credit appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
響かせていく
The party's over
お芝居はお終い
止まらない We get it, we get it go
導いて頂戴...
Don't cry
あたらしい今も
気後れないように創るから
必ず追い付いて見せるから
兎角今迄.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let it resonate
The party's over
The play is finished
I can't stop, We get it, we get it go
Lead me on...
Don't cry
I'll create the new now
So I won't feel left behind
I'll show you I can definitely catch up
Until now, anyway.
